# Skill: IA_P1 Endpoints

## Purpose
Provide canonical API endpoints and expected statuses for automation.

## Canonical Endpoints
- POST `auth/signUp` -> expected 201
- POST `auth/signIn` -> expected 201
- POST `turnos` -> expected 202
- GET `turnos` -> expected 200

## Notes
- Base URL for local execution: `http://localhost:3000/`.
- Use only GET and POST in this project.
